title: Meridian 5.5W SES Dimmable Opal Candle Lamp Bulbs (Pack of 4) 40W 470Lm | Multipack 3000k Warm White Candle Light LED Bulbs
features: IDEAL FOR DECORATIVE FITTINGS: Meridian 5.5W SES Opal Candle Lamp Bulbs Dimmable feature a tapered design to replicate the look of a candle flame, and look great for decorative light fittings. These are Dimmable 3000K warm white bulbs with a SES/E14 Small Edison Screw, and they look particularly effective with light fittings where the bulb is fully exposed. These LED light bulbs are also an ideal shape and size for smaller lamps and fittings, where there is not enough space for larger bulbs.

30,000 HOURS OF LIGHT: These LED light bulbs have an average lifespan of 30,000 hours, which equates to 22 years of daily use (based on 3 hours per day). Halogen light bulbs on the other hand, only have an average life of 2,000 hours (lasting around 2 years at 3 hours per day). Compared to halogen bulbs and incandescent bulbs, LED bulbs are the long-lasting and cost-effective option for every room in the house.

A+ ENERGY RATING: Save up to 80% on your lighting costs with these opal candle lamp bulbs. In comparison to traditional light bulbs, LED light bulbs are much more energy efficient. As well having a longer life, LED Bulbs produce very little waste thermal radiation. While LED light bulbs are more expensive than halogen and incandescent bulbs upfront, they quickly make up their cost by saving energy and preventing frequent bulb replacements.

WARM WHITE BULBS: Create a calming, cosy and inviting atmosphere in the home with the Meridian 3000k Warm White Bulbs. Emitting an orange to yellow light, these candle lamp bulbs are perfect for lighting up living rooms, bedrooms, dining spaces, or any area where you spend time relaxing. Warm white bulbs are one of the most popular choices around the home, and the light is much softer than cool white bulbs. The colour temperature is similar to older style incandescent or halogen bulbs.

SOFT LIGHT DIFFUSION: The Meridian 5.5W SES Opal Candle LED Bulbs Dimmable feature an opaque finish for creating the right atmospheric lighting. Opal LED light bulbs have a milky white colour coating, which helps to soften and diffuse light. This makes them ideal for light fittings where the bulb is on show and for any lamps that do not have a lamp shade attached. Unlike frosted light bulbs, these opal candle LED bulbs glow evenly and can be used to create the perfect ambience at home.
description: LED Candle Bulbs Opal 5.5W B22/SES Pack Of 4 Warm White 3000K Dimmable - Meridian Lighting
